# CimdDocumentCache.IsHostTrusted method

Returns `true` when the host of *clientIdUrl* is permitted by the trust policy (R-23.12-l).

```csharp
public bool IsHostTrusted(string clientIdUrl)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| clientIdUrl | The CIMD `client_id` URL. |

## Return Value

`true` when the host is trusted.
